name: commission-system-vercel-proxy-only
description: Vercel frontend and GAS backend proxy with deep runtime stability, payload-limit alignment, URL safety, and production-current contract locks.

scripts.check:api: node --check api/_gasProxyCommon.js && node --check api/gas.js && node --check api/login.js && node --check api/public-config.js
scripts.build: npm run check:api && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:inline && npm run check:architecture
scripts.audit:strict: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:inline && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict
scripts.check:frontend: node --check github-pages/app-config.js && node --check github-pages/github-gas-transport.js && node --check github-pages/critical-login-runtime.js && node --check github-pages/app-index-foundation-pre-vue.js && node --check github-pages/app-index-foundation-after-vue.js && node --check github-pages/app-index-foundation-after-swal.js && node --check github-pages/app-index-bootstrap.js
scripts.check:inline: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const files=["github-pages/index.html","github-pages/diagnostic.html"];const add=(dir,filter)=>{if(fs.existsSync(dir))for(const f of fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(filter).sort())files.push(dir+"/"+f)};add("github-pages/partials",x=>x.endsWith(".html"));add("gas-backend",x=>x.startsWith("Scripts_")&&x.endsWith(".html"));const errs=[];const kw=/(?<![A-Za-z0-9_$])(?:return|else|throw|typeof|void|delete)(?=[$_][A-Za-z0-9_$])/;for(const file of [...new Set(files)]){const src=fs.readFileSync(file,"utf8");let n=0;src.replace(/<script\b([^>]*)>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi,(_,attrs,code)=>{n++;if(/type\s*=/.test(attrs)&&!/javascript|ecmascript|module/i.test(attrs))return "";const body=String(code||"").trim();if(!body)return "";if(kw.test(body))errs.push(file+"#script"+n+": keyword-token drift");try{new Function(body)}catch(e){errs.push(file+"#script"+n+": "+e.message)}return ""})}if(errs.length){console.error(errs.join("\n"));process.exit(1)}'
scripts.check:architecture: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const read=p=>fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const assert=(ok,msg)=>{if(!ok)throw new Error("ARCHITECTURE_GATE:"+msg)};const boot=read("github-pages/app-index-bootstrap.js")+"\n"+read("gas-backend/Index.html");assert(!/forceExecute|app-script-reexec-host/.test(boot),"page scripts must not be force-executed");assert(boot.includes("__APP_PAGE_SCRIPT_PROMISES__")&&boot.includes("__APP_PAGE_SCRIPT_LOADED__"),"page load-once state missing");const critical=read("gas-backend/Scripts_Critical_Login_Runtime.html");assert(critical.includes("__APP_PAGE_LOAD_PROMISES__")&&critical.includes("__APP_PAGE_LOADED__"),"critical page owner missing");const budget=read("gas-backend/Scripts_Page_Budget.html");const people=read("gas-backend/Scripts_Page_People.html");assert(!/\bvar\s+\$fn\b/.test(budget)&&!/\bvar\s+\$ob\b/.test(budget)&&budget.includes("$budgetFn")&&!/\$B\d+/.test(budget),"Budget generic globals returned");assert(!/\bvar\s+\$fn\b/.test(people)&&!/\bvar\s+\$ob\b/.test(people)&&people.includes("$peopleFn"),"People generic globals returned");const meeting=read("gas-backend/Scripts_Page_Meeting.html");assert(!/_Z\\d+/.test(meeting)&&meeting.includes("$meetingTypeFunction"),"Meeting numeric constants returned");const cases=read("gas-backend/Code_30_Domain_Cases.gs");assert(cases.includes("function _meetingSaveText_")&&cases.includes("function _caseProjectionCanonicalRow_"),"Cases decomposition helpers missing");const router=read("gas-backend/Code_20_Router.gs");assert(router.includes("function _routerCanonicalHandlerMap_")&&router.includes("function _routerResolveCanonicalHandler_"),"explicit router map missing");const login=read("api/login.js");assert(!login.includes("commission_proxy_login")&&!login.includes("Set-Cookie"),"unused proxy login cookie returned");const proxy=read("api/_gasProxyCommon.js");assert(proxy.includes("const upstreamStatus")&&proxy.includes("status: upstreamStatus"),"upstream HTTP status mapping missing");const vercel=JSON.parse(read("vercel.json"));const headers=Object.fromEntries((vercel.headers.find(x=>x.source==="/(.*)")||{headers:[]}).headers.map(x=>[String(x.key).toLowerCase(),x.value]));for(const key of ["content-security-policy","strict-transport-security","x-frame-options","cross-origin-opener-policy"])assert(headers[key],key+" missing");const proxyCommon=read("api/_gasProxyCommon.js");assert(proxyCommon.includes("MAX_STREAM_BODY_BYTES = 4300000")&&proxyCommon.includes("PROXY_LARGE_BODY_METHODS")&&proxyCommon.includes("MAX_RESPONSE_BODY_BYTES = 4300000"),"Vercel payload limit alignment missing");const dashboard=read("gas-backend/Scripts_Page_Dashboard.html");assert(dashboard.includes("dashboardPdfUploadLimitBytes")&&dashboard.includes("3000000"),"Dashboard PDF transport limit missing");assert(meeting.includes("meetingPdfUploadLimitBytes")&&meeting.includes("3000000"),"Meeting PDF transport limit missing");assert(people.includes("$peopleSafeExternalUrl")&&people.includes("rel=\"noopener noreferrer\""),"People external URL hardening missing");const publicConfig=read("api/public-config.js");assert(publicConfig.includes("const upstreamStatus")&&publicConfig.includes("return json(res, upstreamStatus, result)"),"public config upstream status mapping missing");assert(boot.includes("var ownerLoad = load")&&boot.includes("timeout-in-flight")&&boot.includes("ownerPreserved"),"page-script timeout owner preservation missing");const platform=read("gas-backend/Code_00_PlatformCore.gs");const publicConfigBlock=platform.slice(platform.indexOf("function _bw()"),platform.indexOf("function _bF(e)"));assert((publicConfigBlock.match(/vercelStaticFrontendReady:/g)||[]).length===1,"duplicate vercelStaticFrontendReady key");assert((publicConfigBlock.match(/releaseGate:/g)||[]).length===1,"duplicate releaseGate key");const core=read("gas-backend/Scripts_Core_Runtime.html");assert(core.includes("pendingScopes = []")&&core.includes("function rememberScope(scope)")&&core.includes("scheduleApply(mutations[i2].addedNodes[j2])"),"accessibility observer must batch added scopes instead of rescanning the full document");assert(core.includes("function enhanceMediaAndLinks(scope)")&&core.includes("form[action^=\"javascript:\"]"),"accessibility media/link hardening missing");const indexHtml=read("github-pages/index.html")+"\n"+read("gas-backend/Index.html");assert(!indexHtml.includes("action=\"javascript:void(0)\""),"javascript form action returned");assert(indexHtml.includes("id=\"summary-logo-img\"loading=\"lazy\"alt=\"ตราสัญลักษณ์รัฐสภาไทย\""),"summary logo accessible name missing");assert(critical.includes("username.setAttribute(\"aria-label\"")&&critical.includes("password.setAttribute(\"aria-label\""),"critical login accessible labels missing");console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:true,gate:"architecture-load-once-explicit-owner-payload-url-a11y-hardening"}));'
